programs.title: Formula E : Highlights
programs.desc: Formula E is more than a just a racing series. Radical cars, all powered by electricity, pave the way for the road cars of tomorrow, with the series acting as a competitive platform to test and develop the latest in electric technology.

programs.title: Lego Masters
programs.desc: Today our teams are put to the test, challenged to build what their vision of the future is, but seen through the view of a window frame.

programs.title: Seinfeld
programs.desc: Elaine keeps getting dragged to see the The English Patient even though she absolutely hates the film. A gorgeous woman mistakes George for her boyfriend, Neil. Jerry takes on The Mandelbaum Boys.
